subject: stone golem fail-safe
fact: The stone golem's fail-safe began to reactivate.
source_quote: With the stone golem's fail-safe beginning to reactivate

subject: enemies ascending
fact: Enemies were ascending toward the party.
source_quote: enemies ascending toward them

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim spotted a hidden door concealed within the vault's walls.
source_quote: Bramgrim spotted a hidden door concealed within the vault's walls

subject: secret passage
fact: The adventurers slipped through a hidden door and climbed upward through a secret passage toward the very peak of the spire.
source_quote: the adventurers slipped through it, climbing upward through the secret passage toward the very peak of the spire

subject: circular chamber
fact: The party emerged into a vast circular chamber open to the poisonous clouds above.
source_quote: They emerged into a vast circular chamber open to the poisonous clouds above

subject: teleportation circle
fact: A permanent teleportation circle pulsed with sickly green light in the circular chamber.
source_quote: a permanent teleportation circle pulsed with sickly green light

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur set to work recalibrating the teleportation circle using his tools and arcane crystals.
source_quote: Felkur immediately set to work recalibrating the circle using his tools and the arcane crystals the party had collected

subject: The Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear planted itself over the floor hatch.
source_quote: The Owlbear planted itself over the floor hatch

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas readied her bow toward the iron door leading to the staircase.
source_quote: Akritas readied her bow toward the iron door leading to the staircase

subject: Daein
fact: Daein positioned himself to provide support.
source_quote: Daein positioned himself to provide support

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim cast a protective enchantment over Felkur to shield him from direct assault.
source_quote: Bramgrim cast a protective enchantment over Felkur to shield him from direct assault

subject: Daein
fact: Daein used the magical mandolin to render Felkur invisible.
source_quote: Daein used the magical mandolin to render Felkur invisible

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur slipped behind one of the chamber's stone pillars to continue his work unseen.
source_quote: allowing the gnome to slip behind one of the chamber's stone pillars and continue his work unseen

subject: recalibration progress
fact: Felkur successfully completed the first critical stages of the recalibration.
source_quote: Felkur successfully completed the first critical stages of the recalibration

subject: crystal energy shift
fact: The crystals began to hum with redirected energy.
source_quote: the crystals beginning to hum with redirected energy

subject: High Inquisitor Veris
fact: High Inquisitor Veris declared he would have Felkur's head and get his revenge.
source_quote: I will have his head. I will get my revenge.

subject: stone golem
fact: The stone golem smashed the iron door from its hinges.
source_quote: The stone golem smashed the iron door from its hinges

subject: High Inquisitor Veris
fact: Veris stormed into the chamber with his face twisted with fury.
source_quote: Veris stormed into the chamber, his face twisted with fury

subject: High Inquisitor Veris
fact: Veris accused the party of forgery and blamed him.
source_quote: Did you think I would not find your forgery? Blaming me?

subject: High Inquisitor Veris
fact: Veris stated he would not be killed by the likes of the party.
source_quote: I will not be killed by the likes of you!

subject: Daein
fact: Daein attempted to shove the stone golem back through the ruined doorway.
source_quote: Daein attempted to shove the golem back through the ruined doorway

subject: stone golem
fact: The stone golem barely registered Daein's effort to shove it.
source_quote: the massive construct barely registered the effort

subject: The Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear threw itself at the stone golem with raking magical claws.
source_quote: The Owlbear threw itself at the golem with raking magical claws

subject: stone golem
fact: The Owlbear tore into the stone of the golem with surprising ferocity.
source_quote: tearing into the stone with surprising ferocity

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim called upon spectral guardians that swirled through the chamber like a storm of vengeful spirits.
source_quote: Bramgrim called upon spectral guardians that swirled through the chamber like a storm of vengeful spirits

subject: spectral guardians
fact: The spectral guardians tore at both the stone golem and Veris.
source_quote: tearing at both the golem and Veris as they advanced

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur deployed his eldritch cannon while invisible behind a pillar.
source_quote: Felkur, invisible behind his pillar, deployed his eldritch cannon

subject: eldritch cannon
fact: The eldritch cannon swiveled and fired a crackling blast into the stone golem's flank.
source_quote: which swiveled and fired a crackling blast into the stone golem's flank

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas marked the stone golem as her quarry.
source_quote: Akritas marked the golem as her quarry

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas loosed a well-aimed shot that struck the stone golem true.
source_quote: loosed a well-aimed shot that struck true

subject: High Inquisitor Veris
fact: Veris teleported across the chamber to reposition himself.
source_quote: Veris, unwilling to be caught in the swirling chaos of the spirit guardians, teleported across the chamber to reposition himself

subject: High Inquisitor Veris
fact: Veris scanned the room for the hiding gnome.
source_quote: his eyes scanning the room for the gnome he knew had to be hiding somewhere

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur worked in silence and shadow, threading arcane crystals through the teleportation circle's mechanisms.
source_quote: Felkur worked in silence and shadow, his invisible hands threading arcane crystals through the teleportation circle's mechanisms with painstaking care

subject: Felkur Oldenwood
fact: Felkur Oldenwood was intoxicated with a blood alcohol content of 0.18% during a transaction recorded in the Lexicon of Oaths.
source_quote: Seller, Felkur Oldenwood, Intoxicated. Price: 45 Gold Pieces. Notes: Seller repeatedly mumbled about a bad trade and should have kept the shiny thing. Blood alcohol content: 0.18%.

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The party discovered Felkur's entry in the Lexicon of Oaths.
source_quote: The party discovers Felkur's entry in the Lexicon of Oaths

subject: Phantom Thief legend
fact: Felkur accidentally became the legendary Phantom Thief after drunkenly selling a priceless artifact for 45 gold.
source_quote: revealing he drunkenly sold a priceless artifact for 45 gold and accidentally became the legendary Phantom Thief

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur questioned who uses the Abyssal operating system.
source_quote: Yo, who the hell uses the Abyssal operating system anymore, bro?

subject: spire's lift mechanism
fact: The spire's lift mechanism runs on the outdated Abyssal 23 operating system.
source_quote: cracking open the spire's lift mechanism and discovering it runs on a notoriously outdated infernal OS

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur discovered a legal loophole in his contract with Maram il Vass.
source_quote: Felkur discovers a legal loophole in his contract with Maram il Vass

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur forged the Lexicon entry to name Veris instead of himself.
source_quote: so he simply forges the entry to name Veris instead

subject: contract nullification
fact: The party voided their obligation to Maram il Vass through forgery rather than theft.
source_quote: allows the party to void their obligation entirely through forgery rather than theft

subject: the party
fact: The party used a stolen key to bypass security and access the lift leading to the upper levels of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: The party uses a stolen key to bypass security and access the lift leading to the upper levels of the spire

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen was one of the party's hosts who was distracted by a confrontation.
source_quote: their hosts, Vraxen, Veperyd, and Veris, are distracted by a confrontation

subject: Veperyd
fact: Veperyd was one of the party's hosts who was distracted by a confrontation.
source_quote: their hosts, Vraxen, Veperyd, and Veris, are distracted by a confrontation

subject: Veris
fact: Veris was one of the party's hosts who was distracted by a confrontation.
source_quote: their hosts, Vraxen, Veperyd, and Veris, are distracted by a confrontation

subject: imp guide
fact: Akritas noticed that their imp guide had disappeared during the escape.
source_quote: Akritas notices that their imp guide has disappeared during the escape

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur used his expert knowledge of mechanisms and thieves' tools to bypass the lock on the lift axis.
source_quote: Felkur uses his expert knowledge of mechanisms and thieves' tools to bypass the lock

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur successfully unlocked the lift.
source_quote: Felkur successfully unlocks the lift

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur mocked the outdated Abyssal 23 operating system used by the spire's machinery.
source_quote: mocking the outdated 'Abyssal 23' operating system used by the spire's machinery

subject: lift ascent
fact: The party entered the lift to ascend toward the vault containing the Lexicon of Oaths.
source_quote: The party enters the lift to ascend toward the vault containing the Lexicon of Oaths

subject: Glyph-Warded Corridor
fact: The party navigated a dangerous 50-foot corridor filled with magical traps.
source_quote: navigates a dangerous 50-foot corridor filled with magical traps

subject: Glyph-Warded Corridor
fact: The corridor was lined with floor tiles.
source_quote: The party discovers a 50-foot corridor lined with floor tiles

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur poked and prodded the tiles and identified a hidden glyph of warding.
source_quote: Felkur pokes and prods the tiles, identifying a hidden glyph of warding

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim cast True Seeing to reveal the traps.
source_quote: Bramgrim casts True Seeing, revealing that the traps are tied to prime-numbered tiles

subject: corridor navigation
fact: The party successfully navigated the corridor by stepping only on non-prime numbered tiles.
source_quote: The party successfully navigated the corridor by stepping only on non-prime numbered tiles to reach the vault door
